plugins.photosPermission: SheepMug CMS is requesting access to your photo library so you can choose or update profile images, member photos, and event attachments.
plugins.cameraPermission: SheepMug CMS would like to use your camera to capture photos for profiles and events.

plugins.faceIDPermission: Allow SheepMug to use Face ID so only you can unlock this app quickly.

infoPlist.NSPhotoLibraryUsageDescription: SheepMug CMS is requesting access to your photo library so you can choose or update profile images, member photos, and event attachments.
infoPlist.NSPhotoLibraryAddUsageDescription: SheepMug CMS may save images when you export or share from the app.
infoPlist.NSFaceIDUsageDescription: Allow SheepMug to use Face ID so only you can unlock this app quickly.
